---
title: "\'A Conversation on Books\'"
---

## \'A Conversation on Books\'

**Author:** Maria Trench
**Date:** 1885
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (March 1885), 284-94.

### Notes

A review of Richard Chenevix Trench, [[otherbook:981]<i>Brief Thoughts and Meditations on some passages in Holy Scripture</i>] (1884).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
